name: synthesis_focus_v1
description: Challenger policy emphasizing synthesis feasibility in candidate scoring. Single-surface change: plausibility weight increased from 0.20 to 0.25 (+25%), simulation_readiness from 0.10 to 0.12 (+20%), novelty from 0.20 to 0.18 (-10%), inverse_validation_cost from 0.10 to 0.05 (-50%). Hypothesis: candidates that score higher on plausibility and simulation_readiness produce more immediately actionable research leads and better reviewer approval rates.

metadata.hypothesis: Higher plausibility/simulation_readiness weights produce candidates with better reviewer technical plausibility scores and higher approval rates
metadata.rollback_trigger: champion_score_mean regression > 0.05 vs Phase 8 reviewed baseline
